3005950.name: A Red Letter Day
3005950.description:
Genre: All-Ages Romance Visual Novel / Kinetic Novel

🏢 Developer / Publisher: moarea88

🎨 Original Art: Tonpuu

🎵 Music: Yamanyon (nyonline record)
✍ Scenario / Script: Fude-sha

🎬 About This Game

A Red Letter Day is the debut title by doujin circle moarea88, a heartwarming, comedic, and slightly chaotic all-ages romantic visual novel.

📖 Story

Manabu and Ryoko have been childhood friends forever. But Ryoko is starting to think:

“Wouldn’t it be so youthfully romantic if we became lovers during our class trip? If we were in the student trip committee together, we could spend more time with each other!”

With that dreamy idea in mind, Ryoko—who's a bit of an airhead—tries to get Manabu to join the committee, even though he’s busy studying for the civil service exam. Her attempts often backfire, leading to classroom chaos and even the accidental reveal of Manabu’s embarrassing past...

As their classmates cheer them on and get dragged into their antics, a sweet and clumsy 青春（青春）participation-style romantic comedy unfolds.

👧 Characters

🔹 Ryoko

The heroine of A Red Letter Day. Manabu's childhood friend, always by his side.
She’s cheerful, slightly scatterbrained, but deeply cares about Manabu.

She comes up with the idea of becoming class trip committee members together to spice up their daily routine—unaware of the storm it’ll cause.

She’s a great cook, and always makes dinner for Manabu.
(Though the game doesn’t mention how her cooking was before she got good at it...)

🔹 Mai

Ryoko's best friend.
Loves Ryoko—seriously, absolutely, and unconditionally.

Gender doesn’t matter to Mai. She has a boyfriend, but Ryoko is special to her in a different way. When Ryoko’s involved, Mai gets a little weird...

President of the Admire-Ryoko-the-Beautiful Club.

🖥 Features

  • All-ages romantic visual novel (kinetic novel format: no choices)

  • Short and sweet love story filled with comedy and heartwarming moments

  • Fully illustrated CGs and original soundtrack

  • A nostalgic school setting and charming cast

📌 Note to Players

A Red Letter Day is a Japanese visual novel presented primarily in Japanese.
This Steam store page is provided in English for visibility and approval purposes.

We hope you enjoy this youthful, awkward, and touching love story.
